  1. Online Game: God-tier Assassin, I Am the Shadow!
Ch. 1 / 21400.05%
WebWeb+AI
#1I was backstabbed by my sister and reborn!
Chapter 1: I was reborn after being betrayed by my sister!
"Qin Xiaoyou! Are you even human?!"
Qin Feng suddenly opened his eyes!
Veins bulged on his forehead, and his eyes were filled with shock, anger, and disappointment...
It hurts, it hurts so much!
He never dreamed that the younger sister he had taken care of since childhood would do such a thing to him.
"I thought you were just a fangirl, being rebellious. But it turns out..."
Recalling what had just happened, Qin Feng felt utterly chilled!
No one knew that he was a time traveler.
Having just transmigrated into an orphan, she was adopted by a couple.
When he was five years old, the couple had a daughter, whom they named Qin Xiaoyou.
Fortunately, the parents did not favor the younger daughter, but treated them equally.
Qin Feng also took extra care of his younger sister, especially after his parents died in a car accident when he was eighteen. He then shouldered the burden of survival and caring for his sister all by himself.
The change occurred the year Qin Xiaoyou started university.
The game 【God's Abandon】 has arrived!
People can enter the game, kill monsters to gain lifespan, and even consume lifespan to extract in-game abilities into reality!
The strong can tear apart airplanes and tanks with their bare hands, and even withstand nuclear bombs with their bare hands is not a dream.
From that moment on, the world changed drastically, and disasters spread!
When survival became difficult for countless people, Qin Feng, dragging his younger sister Qin Xiaoyou along, overcame all obstacles and became one of the top 100 strongest people in the world!
Finally, Qin Feng obtained a mysterious ancient god's eyeball from an ancient god's ruins!
Now, he finally had the qualifications to climb to the top...
Unexpectedly, his younger sister, Qin Xiaoyou, actually attacked him!
Qin Feng had no defenses against his younger sister.
The other party had added'Soul Wandering Water' to the drink, and after Qin Feng drank it, he completely lost his ability to move...
Then Qin Xiaoyou stood in front of Qin Feng and said calmly:
"From childhood to adulthood, all you've ever done is manage and control me."
"You won't allow this, you won't allow that."
"I feel suffocated every day! I have never experienced freedom!"
"I know you hate Song Fei. You wouldn't let me go to his fan meetings or his concerts... How much have I missed because of you?"
"But do you know what? Brother Song Fei contacted me today..."
"So he knew I existed all along."
"But because of you, he knew there was no possibility between us, and only now have I finally gotten my chance..."
"Once I get your Ancient God's Eye, Brother Song Fei will be stronger than you!"
"You can't stop us from being together!"
Qin Feng's soul wandered outside, watching this scene unfold.
His sister, Qin Xiaoyou, dressed in a white dress, actually gouged out his eyes with her own hands!
Excitement and joy filled the other person's beautiful face: "Don't worry, Brother Song Fei said he'll find you new eyes. As long as you don't stop us from being together..."
Having caught Qin Feng's attention, Qin Xiaoyou left the room in high spirits.
However, what she didn't know was...
Song Fei added some deadly toxins to the'Soul Wandering Water' she gave her!
Shortly after she left, Qin Feng died suddenly!
...
When Qin Feng opened his eyes again, he found himself lying in bed.
This is a simple and refreshing little bedroom.
The curtains by the French windows fluttered gently in the breeze, and rays of warm sunlight filtered through the gaps, falling onto the blankets...
"I've traveled back to... nine years ago?"
I've been reborn?
Qin Feng sat up in bed, looking somewhat dazed.
Recalling everything from his previous life, Qin Feng's expression turned cold.
“Song Fei…”
This person is a celebrity in Daxia.
Qin Xiaoyou had been following him since he was a trainee, and like many fans, she was very enthusiastic and rebellious.
Qin Feng therefore kept an eye on her.
"No staying out all night, no going to bars, no smoking."
"Does this make you feel suffocated?"
"In this era of abandoned gaming, I won't let you team up with strangers. For your safety, I'll guide you through leveling from start to finish..."
"So you feel that this makes you feel restricted?"
Qin Feng still remembers.
On the day the God-Abandoned Game was launched, Qin Xiaoyou was having a fight with him.
Because Song Fei was having a concert in a neighboring city, Qin Xiaoyou wanted to buy a ticket to go, but Qin Feng refused because she had an advanced mathematics exam that day!
Skip the exam and go to a concert?
How could Qin Feng possibly agree?
result……
Qin Xiaoyou still went secretly with her best friend.
Qin Feng originally planned to wait for her to apologize, but the next day, the God-Abandoned Game appeared!
Concerned for Qin Xiaoyou's safety, Qin Feng sought her out and took the initiative to reconcile...
Under Qin Feng's protection, Qin Xiaoyou did not encounter any setbacks or difficulties in this era of disaster, and many people envied her for having such a brother.
But who would have thought that in her heart, Qin Feng, the brother who had taken care of her for more than ten or twenty years, was not as good as a singer and dancer?
"Brother Song Fei?"
"hehe."
"Qin Xiaoyou, I can't believe you're this stupid. Even if you got the Ancient God's Eye, it would be one thing if you used it yourself."
"Give your eyes to someone else..."
"You really think Song Fei knows you and likes you?"
Qin Feng smiled coldly.
The game "God's Abandonment" has arrived. Song Fei, the former star, is doing alright, but he is ultimately just a second-rate expert, not even as good as Qin Feng.
For nine years, Song Fei never had any contact with Qin Feng or Qin Xiaoyou.
As soon as Qin Feng obtained the Ancient God's Eye, the other party came knocking on his door!
Clearly, their sole objective is the eyeball of the ancient god!
Qin Xiaoyou naively believed that the other party wanted to be with her...
"In my past life, I missed out on so much because I was protecting you."
"I missed out on many people and many opportunities."
“I’ve given up on many dangerous areas, simply because I didn’t want to take you into danger.”
"If not for that, I might not only be in the top 100 globally, but could have gone even further..."
"Since you feel that my controlling and protecting you is a constraint, then so be it."
"This life..."
"I'll just pretend I don't have a sister like you."
"It will only be easier without your burden!"
If it were anyone else who did such a thing to Qin Feng, he would never let them off easily after being reborn.
But Qin Xiaoyou...
After all, she was her adoptive parents' biological daughter.
For the sake of her deceased parents, Qin Feng was willing to spare her life, but this was a one-time opportunity...
From now on, let her fend for herself!
As for Song Fei, he was naturally on Qin Feng's kill list!
When Qin Feng decided to get rid of Qin Xiaoyou, he instantly felt relieved and enlightened.
I've never felt so relaxed in all these years.
Qin Feng was very much looking forward to seeing how far he could go without Qin Xiaoyou, this "burden."
Just then!
Suddenly, a cold, mechanical voice rang in Qin Feng's mind, and at the same time, a series of mysterious characters appeared before his eyes!
【'Eye of Judgment' is activated...】
【You have acquired the authority to judge!】
The cold voice startled Qin Feng.
The Eye of Judgment?
The authority to judge?
This is……
He obtained the eye of the ancient god?
"The Eye of Judgment is a relic of the ancient gods."
"When I acquired it, it was already bound to me."
Even if you gouge out my eyes, you can't take them away.
"so……"
"This thing came back with me after I was reborn?"
In his previous life, Qin Feng was unable to activate this thing no matter what he tried.
Unexpectedly, after his rebirth, the ancient god's eyeball was activated!

#2The Eye of Judgment! The Authority of the Ancient Gods!
"What use are the eyes of judgment and the authority of judgment?"
Qin Feng was somewhat puzzled.
He closed his eyes.
In the darkness, it seemed as if an eyeball had existed since time immemorial, staring back at him!
Before Qin Feng's eyes appeared a line of explanatory text.
The writing appeared in a form he could understand—that is, the Great Xia script—and flew from the darkness to his eyes.
——
【Judgment Eye (Activated)】
【Unique Attribute: Authority of Judgment!】
【The Authority of Judgment: The most real and ancient primordial authority in the universe. Its authority transcends rules and order (You do not possess 'divinity' and cannot activate this authority temporarily, but its passive effects are still active)】
【Passive: Upon entering the God-Forsaken Game, you will automatically gain the highest-grade talent.】
——
"Primordial Authority..."
"Does authority supersede rules and order?"
Qin Feng was deeply shocked.
Rules and order—this is the ultimate power that people can gain from the game abandoned by the gods!
In the previous life, in the seventh year of the God-Abandoned Game, a powerful individual escaped the 'Land Abandoned by the Gods' and finally arrived at the 'Land of Order,' thus gaining a sliver of possibility to master the 'Power of Order.'
In fact, for a full nine years, as far as Qin Feng knew, no one on Blue Star had obtained any power of order.
And now, he has actually obtained the 'primordial authority' that transcends order and rules!
"Although I do not yet possess divinity and am unable to exercise authority."
"But the passive effect of this authority is that it automatically grants me the highest-grade talent upon entering the game..."
"Now we're invincible!"
Qin Feng's heart raced.
In his previous life, his talent was at the Emerald level.
Jadeite grade is the seventh level.
The talents, equipment, skills... in the game "God Abandoned" have a total of thirteen tiers!
"Inferior, ordinary, bronze, silver."
"Gold, platinum, jade, diamonds."
"Epic, legend, myth, antiquity, immortality."
"Does this mean I'll possess immortal-level talent this time?"
Qin Feng's Emerald-level talent has already propelled him into the ranks of the world's top 100.
So, what about the Immortal class?
This was something Qin Feng found hard to believe...
He took his phone out from under his pillow.
"The current time is... 8:00 AM."
"The game abandoned by the gods has quietly arrived."
"In my previous life, I was scolded by my boss for being late."
"It wasn't until noon that I found out about the God-Abandoned Game. I even went to the school to find Qin Xiaoyou to make peace and apologize... After arguing for a long time, it was already evening when I entered the game with her."
"A whole day's worth of development time was wasted!"
Now that he has been reborn, Qin Feng naturally wants to seize every second.
I won't do anything unnecessary!
"Starting from 8:00 AM this morning, any adult who falls asleep will have their consciousness enter the 'Land Forsaken by the Gods' and join the game of God's Forsaken!"
"At the same time, our bodies will become ethereal in reality..."
"The ethereal body, though visible to the naked eye, is untouchable, as if it does not exist in this world."
"In other words, once our consciousness enters the game of God's Forsaken, our physical body in reality is in an invincible state of 'unselectable,' existing in a different dimension from reality!"
It was precisely because of this incredible situation that the game "God Abandoned" spread at an extremely rapid pace.
In just half a day, it has spread all over the world...
"Unexpectedly, the time I was reborn was exactly the moment the God-Forsaken Game was launched."
"Fortunately, I often suffer from insomnia and always keep some prescription sleep aids on hand."
Qin Feng immediately planned to enter the game.
On the one hand, he was looking forward to his highest-grade talent.
On the other hand, he needs to get into the game as early as possible to seize the initiative!
When entering the game for the first time, you must be asleep; this is an ironclad rule.
Therefore, Qin Feng did not waste any time.
After taking the prescription medication, I lay down on the bed, ready to fall asleep!
...
at the same time.
Jianghai Normal University.
As autumn arrives, groups of students are heading to their classrooms amidst the fallen leaves scattered throughout the campus, preparing for class.
A girl wearing a white dress, with her long hair flowing, was youthful and beautiful, heading to the classroom with her best friend.
Her short-haired best friend asked curiously, "Hey Xiaoyou, aren't you really going to call your brother to apologize? We skipped our exams yesterday and secretly went to Song Fei's concert. Your brother must be really angry..."
The long-haired girl was Qin Xiaoyou.
She chuckled: "Apologize? He's not my real brother, why can't I go to Song Fei's concert? He's being way too nosy."
My short-haired best friend said helplessly, "But he's so good to you. Aside from being a bit strict with you, he'll buy you anything you want... I'm really envious that you have such a brother!"
Qin Xiaoyou pouted, looking completely indifferent: "I have most of my parents' inheritance. Even without him, I can live just fine, who cares..."
Soon, they entered the classroom and prepared to begin the lesson.
Qin Xiaoyou had no idea that Qin Feng was no longer the brother she could summon at her beck and call...
Little did they know, disaster had already silently descended upon the entire world!
Some videos have already been circulated among certain individuals and in certain regions.
When a person falls asleep, their body becomes an illusory state, which looks very bizarre.
However, no one knows yet what happened to those people who were asleep...
It will take another two or three hours for the news of the 'God-abandoned Game' to spread completely.
And at this moment!
Qin Feng had already fallen asleep.
As he slept, his consciousness drifted through countless worlds and arrived in a dark space.
"It really is this familiar scene..."
Qin Feng was surrounded by darkness, with no light source whatsoever.
Suddenly, strands of grayish-white light coalesced before his eyes into the Great Xia script that he recognized.
——
Welcome to 'God's Forsaken Game'!
【You are about to travel to: the land abandoned by the gods...】
Please select your profession!
【After you choose a profession, you will be randomly assigned a talent that matches that profession. Good luck!】
——
The gray and white text dissipated in front of Qin Feng.
A turntable was quickly formed.
There are many classes on the roulette wheel: warrior, mage, priest, archer, assassin, and so on!
If you choose by yourself, you can only choose these basic professions.
But there's another option: 'Random Class'!
If you choose a random class, there is a small chance that you will get a hidden class.
"In my previous life, I chose the warrior profession because I wanted to protect Qin Xiaoyou."
"The warrior isn't weak, but his mobility is too poor. Soloing isn't really suitable for me right now..."
Warriors have strong survivability, but their monster-killing ability is relatively weak.
This is not suitable for Qin Feng now.
"Anyway, I have the highest-grade talent, so I'll be strong no matter what profession I'm in."
"Why not try it randomly?"
"Maybe a hidden class will appear?"
Qin Feng didn't hesitate for long before choosing—random class!
#3Hidden profession! I am the shadow!
When Qin Feng made his choice, the gray-white turntable in front of him began to spin.
A phantom gray pointer gradually came to rest in an area marked with a question mark!
"This is... a hidden event?"
Qin Feng's heart suddenly raced!
As the gray pointer stopped, the question mark on the dial gradually formed a black symbol.
It was shaped somewhat like the Greek letter 'φ', but also different.
Both ends are like sword blades, incredibly sharp, exuding killing intent!
——
【Congratulations on obtaining the class: Shadow (Unique)!】
【Shadow: The only hidden class. You were born of shadow, you become shadow, you are the grim reaper of darkness.】
【Passive Skill 1: Stealth duration doubled!】
【Passive Skill 2: +1 Stealth Level!】
【Passive Skill 3: If you are not in the enemy's line of sight when you launch an attack, the damage of that attack is doubled!】
——
Hidden Class: Shadow!
Qin Feng was overjoyed!
"This class is the god of solo play!"
"In my previous life, there seemed to be a Shadow player as well, but he was killed very early on. I wonder how powerful this class is in the late game..."
"But just these three initial job passives alone mean that my survivability will be very strong!"
In the game "God Forsaken," what is most important?
At first, many people didn't understand it.
But as more and more people died, people finally understood...
Survival skills are the most important thing in God-abandoned games!
Dying in the God-Abandoned Game will not result in true death, but it will cause you to lose half of your remaining lifespan!
This is the true cruelty of God-abandoned Games!
In the game "God Abandoned," players can gain lifespan by killing monsters, and lifespan can even become a universal currency worldwide.
However, if you die in the game, your remaining lifespan will be halved...
"When lifespan reaches zero, death will occur."
"In reality, if someone kills you, you will die."
"To maintain our strength in the real world, we must also sacrifice our lifespan to extract the equipment and skills from the game into reality..."
"The importance of lifespan is self-evident!"
Of course, survivability is important, but so is damage dealt.
The'Shadow' class deals double damage as long as it doesn't attack within the enemy's line of sight!
"Being out of the enemy's sight... stealth counts too!"
"In short, this class has both considerable survivability and damage output."
"As expected of the only hidden class."
Qin Feng was already very satisfied with this job.
He is at least much stronger than his ordinary professional 'warrior' in his previous life.
Once they develop, even the toughest warrior class can't withstand Qin Feng's attack!
Next, Qin Feng checked his initial skills.
——
【Initial Skill: Shadow Step (Inferior). Enters stealth for 8 seconds; attacking will reveal the user. Increases the attack power of the first strike after breaking stealth by 30. Cooldown: 30 seconds.】
【Initial Skill: Back Attack Enhancement (Poor Quality). Passive Effect: Increases damage by 10% when attacking from behind.】
——
The former becomes invisible, while the latter passively gains increased back attack damage.
Both skills are the lowest grade 'inferior' skills, which is normal, because all professions start with skills of this grade.
"I have the Shadow class's passive effect, which doubles the stealth duration... that's 16 seconds of stealth."
"A 30-second cooldown is still a bit short to achieve infinite invisibility."
Qin Feng felt a little regretful.
But soon, he stopped feeling regretful.
because……
The passive effect from 'The Authority of Judgment' has finally taken effect.
Once Qin Feng's profession was determined, the system randomly assigned him a top-tier talent!
——
【Congratulations on acquiring the talent: Infinite Evolution!】
【Infinite Evolution: Originally a basic talent, gray-white quality. When you defeat monsters in solo mode, you have a chance to obtain 'Evolution Points', which can be used to evolve skills!】
(Note: You will automatically receive 5 evolution points every 24 hours. When you defeat a boss-level monster in solo mode, you will receive evolution points 100% of the time!)
【Current Evolution Points: 5!】
——
"What the hell?"
"Isn't it an immortal-level talent?"
"Why is it a gray-white quality original primary talent?"
Qin Feng was a little dumbfounded.
The original beginner level? I've never heard of this level before!
Furthermore, is the gray-white quality definitely not inferior or ordinary gray and white?
It looks like...
This doesn't seem like top-tier talent at all!
certainly.
Whether a talent is strong or not depends on its effectiveness.
"Infinite evolution, can it evolve skills?"
"In that case, shall I try evolving the'Shadow Stealth' skill?"
Qin Feng tried.
He checked and found that evolving the'Shadow Step' skill now requires 1 evolution point.
When he chose to evolve...
The skill has indeed changed.
——
【You have consumed 1 evolution point, with 4 points remaining.】
【Initial Skill: Shadow Step (Inferior → Normal). Enters stealth for 8 → 12 seconds; attacking will reveal the target. Break stealth attack power increased by 30 → 60. Cooldown: 30 → 28 seconds.】
——
"The duration of invisibility has increased?"
Qin Feng's eyes lit up.
This, combined with his Shadow class passive effect, has achieved a stealth duration of 24 seconds!
if……
"Keep evolving!"
——
【You have consumed 2 evolution points, leaving you with 2.】
【Initial Skill: Shadow Step (Normal → Bronze). Enters stealth for 12 → 16 seconds; attacking will reveal the target. Break stealth attack power increased by 60 → 90. Cooldown: 28 → 26 seconds.】
——
It consumed 2 evolution points, but the effect was significant.
The duration of Shadow Strike has been increased to 16 seconds, which, combined with the Shadow class passive's doubling effect, makes it 32 seconds!
The skill's cooldown time has expired!
"The Shadow skill has a cooldown period after it is used."
"With such a long invisibility duration, I can now remain invisible indefinitely, and each attack that breaks invisibility will also add an extra 90 points of attack power!"
Don't underestimate the 90 extra attack power.
In the early stages of the game, a mage, archer, or warrior might have around 20 or 30 points of attack power.
90 points of attack power is equivalent to dealing several times more damage than others.
in addition……
"My Shadow class passive ability doubles the damage when attacking if the opponent has no line of sight."
"These 90 extra attack points are actually equivalent to 180 extra attack points!"
Qin Feng couldn't help but click his tongue in amazement.
His initial combat strength is already equivalent to his combat strength after one day of development in his previous life.
This is the only hidden class, plus the most top-tier talent effects!
"The original beginner level talent... it seems to be the most outstanding talent indeed!"
"Moreover, this talent has a name: Infinite Evolution."
"Wouldn't it be possible to keep evolving the skill, making the effects more and more incredible?"
Qin Feng could only say...
With his transmigrator and reborn person buffs fully stacked, he certainly didn't disappoint.
In addition, since evolution points can be obtained by defeating monsters, Qin Feng doesn't need to save them.
Use what you have to convert it into combat power for maximum benefit.
Keep evolving!
Ch. 1 / 21400.05%
